1.dv: of uncertain affinity; a deity, especially (with G3588 (ὁ)) the supreme Divinity;

2.dv: of uncertain affinity; a deity, especially (with G3588 (ὁ)) the supreme Divinity;

4.gl: graciousness (as gratifying), of manner or act (abstract or concrete; literal, figurative or spiritual; especially the divine influence upon the heart, and its reflection in the life; including gratitude)
4.kj: acceptable, benefit, favour, gift, grace(- ious), joy, liberality, pleasure, thank(-s, -worthy)

4.gl: peace (literally or figuratively); by implication, prosperity
4.kj: one, peace, quietness, rest, + set at one again
4.dv: probably from a primary verb (to join);

5.gl: blood, literally (of men or animals), figuratively (the juice of grapes) or specially (the atoning blood of Christ); by implication, bloodshed, also kindred
